elements.text: Factory owners buy the signal, while QC and line teams use it every day.

elements.text: QuickEye is strongest where visual inspection is still manual and the result needs to survive a shift handoff.

elements.text: They want margin protection, defect trends, and evidence that quality is improving rather than just being discussed.

and evidence that quality is improving rather

elements.text: They run the review loop, check patterns across shifts, and make sure the inspection record is easy to trust.

elements.text: They need quick capture, a clear verdict, and a simple path for reporting defects during the shift.

elements.text: Start with one line, one QC lead, and one factory owner who needs a cleaner operating signal from inspection history.
